title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

That's why you need a reliable alternative for selling digital products without Gumroad or PayPal – one that can handle restricted countries and provide instant automated delivery.

When you choose to sell PDF guides without Gumroad, you're not just replacing one payment processor with another. You're also deciding on the level of automation, delivery capabilities, and fees you're willing to accept. For example, Gumroad itself restricts creators from countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, while PayPal and Stripe have strict KYC requirements that many digital creators can't meet. That's where our Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard come in – providing a one-time payment solution for your digital products that doesn't rely on PayPal, Stripe, or any other restricted payment processor.

When you sell digital products without Gumroad, you need a payment processor that can handle restricted countries without any issues. That's exactly what our NOWPayments integration offers – 300+ coins supported, no KYC requirements, and no buyer account needed. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe have strict policies against creators from certain countries, while Gumroad itself has a blocked countries list that you can't opt out of. Our solution gives you the freedom to sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world.

When you choose to sell PDF guides without Gumroad, you'll also need to think about payment speed, fees, and real costs. Our solution gives you full control over your payment processing fees and lets you keep more of your hard-earned cash.
Gumroad blocks creators from countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, but our NOWPayments integration has no such restrictions.

How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
